parameters.query:
INSERT INTO submissions (message, contact, category, channel)
  VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'web')
  RETURNING id, message

UPDATE submissions
  SET tags = ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($1::json)),
      risk_level = $2,
      priority = $3,
      is_spam = $4,
      requires_response = $5,
      status = 'triaged'
  WHERE id = $6::uuid

UPDATE submissions
  SET github_issue_url = $1
  WHERE id = $2::uuid
